title: Fixed "subscription_period" docstring
body:
Fixed method docstring for "subscription_period".

Python version: 3.10

OS: macOS Sonoma 14.7

Checklist:
- Just minor change of param docstring

step_plan.summary: Documentation-only fix: correct the subscription_period parameter docstring. No functional changes or API surface changes are introduced.

steps.reason: Docstring-only change detected; no code-level modifications required as subscription_period docstring is the only target
steps.side_effects: No runtime impact; only documentation clarity. No tests affected. CI/docs build unaffected beyond documentation rendering.
